audio.transcript: Today's AI engineering briefing. Item 1: VulnHunter: Capital One's agentic AI code security tool. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 2: Prompt submitted to cloud even when using local LLM by default. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: prompt. Read it through that lens. Item 3: LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. No strong keyword match; defaulted to foundations. Read it through that lens. Item 4: Are there words LLMs won't say?. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. No strong keyword match; defaulted to foundations. Read it through that lens. Item 5: Show HN: Wolbarg – Local-first shared memory for AI agents using SQLite. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent, memory. Read it through that lens. Item 6: Show HN: On-chain bond market where the issuers are AI agents. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens.
